slimNotes: Controlled WorkWise snapshot of PPT Master v4.0.0. Core routing, references, workflows, all 55 top-level Python scripts and their modules, editable SVG/PPTX conversion, 187 preset shapes, confirmation UI, chart templates, five brand presets, two deck presets, the presentation_core layout, and two lightweight SVG examples are retained. Large icon and AI-comparison image libraries, user projects, generated exports, backups, and private PPTX files are excluded. requirements.txt and the prompt-audit manifest are WorkWise-maintained overlays; no Pandoc dependency is installed. autoUpdate is disabled; a future upgrade requires a new audited snapshot.
